---
name: Pull Request Template
about: Propose changes to the codebase
title: "[FEAT]: "
labels:
  - "enhancement"
assignees:
  - side-chaine
---

## Description

Explain the purpose of this pull request. What does it solve or what new feature does it add?

## Related Issues

Link to any issues that this pull request addresses (e.g., #123).

## Changes Made

Provide a high-level summary of the changes in this pull request.

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or GIFs to demonstrate the changes visually.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.
- [ ] I have signed off my commits (see CONTRIBUTING.md for details).
